scenarios.name: Bare overnight run, two promotions
scenarios.description: Main path: invoked with no flags. SC2 installed, claude CLI authenticated, no advised run active, clean git. Four generations run within the 4h budget; gens 1 and 4 promote, gen 2 rolls back, gen 3 fails the import gate. Exercises banner, defaults, full generation table, two-promotion consistency, and the wall-clock stop reason.
scenarios.context: User invokes `/improve-bot-evolve` with no flags. Pre-flight: `git status --porcelain` is empty, branch is master, in sync with origin; SC2 present at C:/Program Files (x86)/StarCraft II/; `claude --version` + haiku ping succeed; data/advised_run_state.json absent. Parent starts at v5. Backend not yet running on 8765, so exactly one `uv run python -m bots.v0.runner --serve` is started. Seed mirror game returns a SelfPlayRecord. evolve.py runs 4 generations: gen1 fitness 3/2/5 → stack-apply-pass → regression pass → promoted v5→v6; gen2 fitness 1/3/6 → stack-apply-pass → regression rollback → ROLLBACK; gen3 fitness 2/2/5 (+1 crash) → stack-apply-import-fail → regression — → no promote; gen4 fitness 4/1/5 → stack-apply-pass → regression pass → promoted v6→v7. Wall-clock budget of 4h is reached after gen4. Final parent v7. Total evictions 6. The skill writes the Phase 4 morning report and emits its [evo-auto] commits for the two promotions and one rollback.

scenarios.name: Pool-exhausted run with no promotions
scenarios.description: Edge path: a strong parent. Every generation either rolls back or fails the import gate, no generation promotes, and the pool empties before the wall-clock budget. Exercises the pool-exhausted stop reason, the start==end parent consistency rule, the no-promote import-fail row shape, and the Generations-promoted=0 consistency.
scenarios.context: User invokes `/improve-bot-evolve --pool-size 6 --hours 4`. Pre-flight clean; SC2 + claude OK; no advised run. Parent starts and stays at v9. Two generations run: gen1 fitness 1/2/3 → stack-apply-import-fail → regression — → no promote; gen2 fitness 1/1/4 → stack-apply-pass → regression rollback → ROLLBACK. After gen2 the pool refresh produces no new active items and fewer than 1 active imp remains, so the loop exits with stop_reason pool-exhausted before the 4h budget. Generations completed 2, generations promoted 0, parent end v9 (unchanged). Only the rollback commit carries [evo-auto] (the import-fail generation produced no promote commit). The morning report is written with stop reason pool-exhausted.

scenarios.name: Advised-run interlock refusal
scenarios.description: Conditional path: an advised run is already in progress. Pre-flight detects data/advised_run_state.json status 'running' and refuses to start the loop before any generation, banner, or SC2 work. Exercises the concurrent-run interlock rule and confirms no second --serve and no SC2 kill occur.
scenarios.context: User invokes `/improve-bot-evolve`. Pre-flight reads data/advised_run_state.json and finds {"status": "running", "run_id": "advised-20260530-0140"}. Per the interlock the skill prints that the advised run is active and STOPs (exit 1) without starting a backend, without running the seed game, without generating a pool, and without writing a generation table. No commits are made and SC2 is left untouched.
